auth.loginIntro: Sign in to view your family's dashboard.

errors.INVALID_CREDENTIALS: That email and password don't match just yet. Feel free to try again.
errors.RATE_LIMITED: Just a moment — please try again in a minute.
errors.VALIDATION_FAILED: Please enter a valid email address and password.
errors.generic: Something went wrong while signing in. Please try again in a bit.

vandaag.title: Today
vandaag.body: Coming soon: per child, what's open, what's done, and what's waiting for approval.

goedkeuren.title: Approvals
goedkeuren.body: Coming soon: the approval queue with photos — approve or ask for a redo in one tap.

taken.title: Tasks
taken.body: Coming soon: manage tasks and rewards, plus the weekly planner.

winkel.title: Shop
winkel.body: Coming soon: set up rewards and review redemption requests.

inzichten.title: Insights
inzichten.body: Coming soon: weekly trends to support the conversation — never as a monitoring tool.
